targets.sourceTitle: Come l’Intelligenza Artificiale entra in classe, voci ed esperienze di Ateneo

stopConditions: Stop after official Polito sources with substantive AI policy or guidance relevance have been fetched and staged.
Do not infer binding policy from news, event, training, or course-offering pages.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Come l’Intelligenza Artificiale entra in classe, voci ed esperienze di Ateneo
artifacts.queryUsed: site:polito.it intelligenza artificiale generativa studenti esami policy
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official Politecnico di Torino Poliflash article. It discusses IA4Teach@Polito and states that initial university actions include recommendations on AI use and guidelines on theses, exams, assessment, and responsible use of generative tools.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Intelligenza Artificiale: tecnologie, modelli e applicazioni
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official page, but it is a master program/course-offering page rather than an AI policy or university guidance source.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: Intelligenza Artificiale: tecnologie, modelli e applicazioni
artifacts.notes: The official page concerns a master's offering and does not state institutional AI policy or guidance.

methodsAttempted.notes: Confirmed robots.txt permits the staged official Poliflash and didactic URLs; login and administrative paths are disallowed and were not accessed.

methodsAttempted.query: site:polito.it intelligenza artificiale generativa studenti esami policy
methodsAttempted.notes: Found an official Poliflash article about IA4Teach@Polito and an official master program page. The article had substantive guidance-relevant text; the master page was rejected as a course-offering source.
Italian-language queries led back to the official Poliflash article. No separate public formal policy text was found in this staged pass.

artifacts.summary: The staged run found one official Polito source with substantive AI teaching-guidance relevance. It did not find a public formal binding AI policy page; therefore claims are scoped to the existence and topics of recommendations/guidelines described in the official news/advisory source.

artifacts.title: Politecnico di Torino staged AI policy source review
artifacts.summary: This staged run found an official Politecnico di Torino Poliflash article stating that IA4Teach@Polito is an annual AI-and-teaching initiative and describing university actions around AI-use recommendations and guidelines for theses, exams, assessment, and responsible use of generative tools. No public formal binding AI policy text was found in this pass, so all claims are limited to the official article's description.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.

The staged source is an official news/advisory article, not a formal policy document; claims should not be promoted as binding university policy without human review of the underlying recommendations or guidelines.
No login-gated or access-controlled source was accessed.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
